allowlistReason: MA/MB/MD control-theory learning-substrate island (MA-2 ACE actor-critic — the island's import sink; the other island modules import ace, ace imports none of them). Flag-gated default-OFF; flag-off byte-identical (src/integration/__tests__/continuation/flag-off-byte-identical.test.ts). ace's only production edge is the default-off M5 orchestration-selector; otherwise reachable only within the island, not from a production entry point. Parked pending a learning-loop runtime consumer (generic resume, not v1.50-specific); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-04. See docs/learning-substrate-parked.md.

Educational content cartridge (36 audio-engineering concepts across 6 domains, 32 citations; v1.49.16). Content cluster, not core substrate — analogous to the allowlisted `holomorphic` pack. Imported only by type-only college-enrichment refs + one cartridge test, both unreachable. Default-OFF, zero import side-effects. Generic resume (a content-delivery/curriculum surface); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-05.

Bayesian sequential A/B substrate (IPM-BOED design selector + Wasserstein-1/sliced-Wasserstein primitives + conjugate priors per arXiv:2604.21849; v1.49.579+). Reachable only via ab-harness/wasserstein-boed.ts, which the shipped sign-test coordinator does not invoke. Substrate-level reference like tonnetz/wasserstein-hebbian; default-OFF, comprehensive tests. Generic resume (a Bayesian coordinator evolution); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-05.

M5 agentic-orchestration substrate (PrefixIndex prefix cache + StepGraph k-gram predictor + Preloader skill prewarmer; JP-007 speculative decoding; v1.49.561). Reachable only via orchestration/draft-verify-router.ts, which is unexported and test-only (the unwired predictive-skill-loader frontier) — wiring an artificial CLI would manufacture a path to dormant code. Default-OFF. Generic resume (an anticipatory-preload runtime, cf. Ship 4.2); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-05.

Security-dashboard UI render functions (SecurityPanel; Phase 372). Re-exported by src/security/index.ts, but that barrel has zero non-test production importers, so it is unreachable from the TS production graph; it is, however, the TS half of a TS<->Rust dashboard IPC contract mirrored in src-tauri/src/security/types.rs. Preserved (not retired) to avoid orphaning the cross-language contract; the Rust/Tauri layer is out of audit scope. Generic resume (wiring the security dashboard); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-05.

Substrate-level reference implementation per arXiv:2604.19960 (Boland 2026, MATH-20 Phase 752). Ships the 24-triad neo-Riemannian lattice + P/L/R transforms + Sound of Puget Sound mapping (360 species × 360 musicians on the shared unit circle). The SoPS mapping is itself the substrate for an operator-filtered research-cadence surface; the module is the durable backing for that surface. Default-OFF, HARD-preservation invariants intact (G6 standard CAPCOM preservation gate), zero side-effects at import. ALLOWLISTED rather than RETIRED because the substrate is preserved, not filtered out.

M7 Umwelt — categorical generative model + Markov-blanket partition + variational free-energy minimiser (core Living Sensoria M1..M8 substrate; v1.49.640/647). Type re-exports in src/types/index.ts are type-only (safe); the only implementation consumer (symbiosis/m7-adapter.ts) is test-only. Default-OFF preserved substrate. Generic resume (an M5/learning-loop Living-Sensoria consumer); retire-or-resume review by 2027-06-05.

Substrate-level reference implementation per arXiv:2604.16052 (Tan 2026, 75pp, MATH-19 Phase 751). Companion runtime to the canonical substrate doc docs/substrate-references/wasserstein-hebbian.md (deliberately not a faithful re-derivation; substrate-level reader's reference to the Wasserstein-2 framework for Hebbian plasticity). Ships closed-form W₂² helper + bounded-variance check + plasticity-rule validator + audit-finding emitter. Default-OFF, advisory-only (CAPCOM retains gate authority), zero side-effects at import.
